options.description: Force encryption when connecting to the server
Specifies the username to use when connecting to the server

Print files to the named printer
Specifies an existing job to modify
Sends an email when the job is completed
Sets the number of copies to print
Sets the job priority from 1 (lowest) to 100 (highest). The default priority is 50
Do not report the resulting job IDs (silent mode)

Specifies when the job should be printed.  A value of immediate will print the file immediately, a value of hold will hold the job indefinitely, and a UTC time value (HH:MM) will hold the job until th

Specifies which pages to print in the document. The list can contain a list of numbers and ranges (#-#) separated by commas, e.g., "1,3-5,16". The page numbers refer to the output pages and not the do
Sets one or more job options
